name: academic-writing-toolkit
description: Project-centred academic writing, argument and evidence governance, thesis drift control, manuscript reframing, revision escalation, review synthesis, release governance, citation auditing, reference verification, and export skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Organise research, govern claims and evidence, and revise without drift.
interface.longDescription: Academic Writing Toolkit helps authors recover the canonical state of a research project, distinguish gaps, data, results, claims, contributions, and innovation evidence, lock the scope of headline claims, review contribution focus without silently changing it, stop after three failed revisions, and preserve factual session summaries. Its 21 local skills support evidence-controlled reading, writing, review, revision, audit, and release workflows while keeping author approval at structural decision points.
defaultPrompt: Map my research gap, claims, evidence, contributions, and innovation before revising.
锁定论文论证层级和证据许可，判断贡献侧重，再选择下一项受控工作流。
After three failed revisions, stop and diagnose drift before another edit.
